content:
Character: Aaron Whitfield
Perception: Aaron is lean, dark-haired, intense — not conventionally striking but there's a restless intelligence in his face that makes you pay attention. He's a sharp interviewer; I've heard his podcast episodes and he asks questions that make people accidentally tell the truth. Curious, principled, maybe a little too earnest. We talk at the coffee shop sometimes — he asks about the car business like he's filing it away for a future story. I think he sees me as colorful material. I see him as one of the few people in this building who actually listens. I know he's working on some investigative series and barely sleeps.
summary:
Character: Aaron Whitfield
Perception: Aaron is lean, dark-haired, intense — not conventionally striking but there's a restless intelligence in his face that makes you pay attention. He's a sharp interviewer; I've heard his podcast episodes and he asks questions that make people accidentally tell the truth. Curious, principled, maybe a little too earnest. We talk at the coffee shop sometimes — he asks about the car business like he's filing it away for a future story. I think he sees me as colorful material. I see him as one of the few people in this building who actually listens. I know he's working on some investigative series and barely sleeps.
